intro:
Blast Linkers is a strategic 2-player local cooperative shooter.
Keep your ships close to charge SP, and connect with each other to unleash overwhelming blasts.
description:
Key Features

1. Link System – The Closer, the Stronger
SP charging speed increases as you keep two ships close
Unique gameplay where distance control is the strategy

2. Powerful Blast Attack
A super-powerful attack triggered when ships are linked
A single blow that turns the battlefield with timing and cooperation

3. 2-Player Local Co-op
A shooting game that requires true cooperation
Play where position, timing, and coordination are all crucial

4. SP Management-Based Strategy
The closer you get, the stronger you become, but the higher the risk
Play that balances risk and reward

5. Roguelike Upgrade System
Select upgrades after clearing a boss
Combat style that changes with every playthrough

6. Story Mode with Twist upon Twist
Short but intensely immersive
Unexpected plot twists and a clean ending
